conflicts.reason: Choose one Shadows of Amn Banter Accelerator

Both install identical bantergoose banter accelerator script. Kelsey #3 is DEPRECATED by its own authors. Use Banter Pack #1 instead and skip Kelsey #3. All other Kelsey components (#0, #1, #4) are fully compatible with Banter Pack.
conflicts.source: Kelsey tp2 DESIGNATED 3 marked DEPRECATED. Banter Pack has FORBID_FILE bantergoose.xxx check. Identical scripts, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both modify banter timing. Use one banter accelerator method — A7 or Banter Pack's built-in.

a: Jason Compton, Kish Moore, Blue, Ghreyfain, Kirwond, Bons, jastey
sum: Adds inter-party banters between Bioware NPCs who rarely talk to each other in vanilla. Makes the party feel more alive during travel.
